filter_criteria: ACTIVE (lifecycle) AND HIGH (confidence) from ALR-v1 + ACR-v1

excluded.note: N-032 (51.x Demo Surface) is ACTIVE+HIGH but REJECTED as architecture layer. Included in canonical corpus as consumer boundary, not as architecture layer.

canonical_corpus.label: Governance Master Capsule
canonical_corpus.role: Defines 11 governing constraints including GC-06 (Evidence First) and GC-07 (State-Diagnosis Separation)
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Foundational governance; all downstream architecture must comply

canonical_corpus.label: PiOS Pipeline Specification
canonical_corpus.role: 9-Stage Pipeline canonical definition (Stages 1-9 mapped to streams 40.2-40.9)
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Canonical operational pipeline; confirmed F-A framing HIGH confidence

canonical_corpus.label: PiOS Runtime Architecture
canonical_corpus.role: Defines stream zones, execution model, and PiOS scope
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Canonical architecture document; source of stream zone boundaries

canonical_corpus.label: PiOS Execution Contract
canonical_corpus.role: Non-negotiable execution rules; Evidence First rule; fail-closed constraints
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Binding execution constraints across all layers

canonical_corpus.label: Three-Layer Analytical Model
canonical_corpus.role: Defines Observability Layer (40.2-40.4), Intelligence Layer (40.5-40.6), Executive Intelligence Layer (40.7)
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Canonical analytical architecture; confirmed F-B framing HIGH confidence

canonical_corpus.label: 40.2 Evidence Acquisition
canonical_corpus.role: Evidence snapshot, provenance tracking; source-only intake (run_02 boundary)
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Pipeline Stage 1; Three-Layer Layer 1 input

canonical_corpus.label: 40.3 Program Reconstruction
canonical_corpus.role: PEG production (87 nodes, 40 edges); repository map; capability map
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Pipeline Stage 2; PEG feeds 41.1 semantic elevation

canonical_corpus.label: 40.4 Telemetry Extraction
canonical_corpus.role: Structural/activity/delivery telemetry datasets
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Pipeline Stage 3; telemetry input to 40.5 signal computation

canonical_corpus.label: 40.5 Signal Computation
canonical_corpus.role: 8 signals defined; 5 admitted (SIG-001..005) to 41.4 registry
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Pipeline Stage 4; L3 signal derivation layer; source of all downstream signal flow

canonical_corpus.label: 40.6 Condition+Diagnosis Activation
canonical_corpus.role: Condition datasets (observable state) + diagnosis outputs (systemic dynamics); GC-07 enforced
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Pipeline Stages 5+6; exclusive input to 40.7 via boundary enforcement

canonical_corpus.label: 40.7 Intelligence Synthesis
canonical_corpus.role: Intelligence objects; evidence-linked program state summaries
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Pipeline Stage 7; Three-Layer Layer 3 output; decision-grade intelligence

canonical_corpus.label: 40.11 Handover Capsule
canonical_corpus.role: Authoritative boundary between 40.x runtime and 50/51.x demo surface
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Defines 51.x as consumer-only; establishes read-only constraint on 40.x outputs for demo surface

canonical_corpus.label: 41.1 Semantic Elevation
canonical_corpus.role: 89 components → 17 domains + 42 capabilities; evidence-grounded transformation
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: L4 semantic shaping layer; transforms structural reconstruction into navigable semantic structure

canonical_corpus.label: 41.2 PIE Vault
canonical_corpus.role: Program intelligence evidence vault
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Evidence repository for semantic layer; feeds consolidation (41.3)

canonical_corpus.label: 41.4 Signal Registry
canonical_corpus.role: 5 admitted signals (SIG-001..005); CKR-backed; governs binding eligibility
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Canonical signal gate; only CKR-admitted signals proceed to 43.x binding

canonical_corpus.label: 43.1 Signal-to-Structure Binding
canonical_corpus.role: Deterministic non-interpretive signal-to-node binding; fail-closed; SSZ/SSI prohibited; L3/L4 fragment anchors
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Primary binding definition; contains most explicit L-number fragment evidence

canonical_corpus.label: 43.2 Payload Contract
canonical_corpus.role: Binding output payload shape specification
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Defines what binding must produce for validation gate

canonical_corpus.label: 43.3 Validation Envelope
canonical_corpus.role: Validation gate; 5 projection records produced from 5 admitted signals
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Gate between binding and projection layers; fail-closed

canonical_corpus.label: 44.1 Projection Definition
canonical_corpus.role: Projection from validated binding to structural overlay; L3 explicit anchor; no reverse dependency
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Projection definition; L3 layer fragment most explicit here (Section 2)

canonical_corpus.label: 44.2 Projection Attachment
canonical_corpus.role: 5 records with emphasis attributes; direct input to 42.21 runtime intake
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Output of projection layer; consumed by 42.x

canonical_corpus.label: 44.3 Emphasis Attribute
canonical_corpus.role: Emphasis attribute definition (primary/secondary); pass-through to rendering
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Final projection output attribute; visible in ExecLens surface

canonical_corpus.label: 42.21 Runtime Intake
canonical_corpus.role: First consumer layer; governed artifact intake from 44.2; read-only
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Consumer boundary entry point; no binding production

canonical_corpus.label: 42.22 Exposure Validation
canonical_corpus.role: 5 records validated for rendering; end-to-end provenance chain terminus
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Consumer validation gate; provenance chain confirmed from 42.22 back to 40.5

canonical_corpus.label: CKR — Canonical Knowledge Registry
canonical_corpus.role: 34 governed constructs; admission authority for all signal participation in binding
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Governs what signals are eligible for architecture participation

canonical_corpus.label: INT-01 / INT-02 Integration Protocol
canonical_corpus.role: Dual-agent model; ChatGPT architect + Claude Code engine; authority separation
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Defines execution authority model; determines who can change what

canonical_corpus.label: 51.x Demo Surface (Consumer Boundary)
canonical_corpus.role: ExecLens demo surface; 4 signals displayed (SIG-002..005); reads 40.x outputs
canonical_corpus.architecture_contribution: Confirms consumer boundary; validates read-only enforcement; REJECTED as architecture layer
